summary: A clip from a local news segment. An older woman is interviewed inside a home near a large blue dollhouse model, with the lower-third ALLEGED SERIAL ARSONIST RELEASED ON BAIL, NASSAU CO. OFFICIALS DENOUNCE BAIL REFORM LAWS. The segment cuts to nighttime surveillance footage of a parking area where vehicles are on fire, marked EYEWITNESS NEWS EXCLUSIVE with an ABC7 logo.

script.scene: An older woman is interviewed at home near a blue dollhouse; lower-third reads ALLEGED SERIAL ARSONIST RELEASED ON BAIL.
Nighttime surveillance footage shows vehicles on fire in a parking area, marked EYEWITNESS NEWS EXCLUSIVE.
Continued footage of the fire scene.
